name: AP Availability Map
principle: A missing node should still guide the learner.

available.label: Available
available.summary: This resource is available now. Use it as an active waypoint in the AP system.

final-edits.label: Final Edits
final-edits.summary: This resource is close to release. Until it is published, AP should route the learner through adjacent essays, frameworks, and Atlas views.

in-development.label: In Development
in-development.summary: This resource is being built. It should be treated as a curriculum waypoint with useful substitutes, not a dead end.

planned.label: Planned
planned.summary: This resource is planned. AP should explain why it matters and offer a meaningful path forward.

items.title: The Operator’s Guide to Complex Systems
items.whyItMatters: This book establishes the field guide foundation for seeing behavior, constraints, pressure, adaptation, and failure inside real systems.
items.currentAlternative: Begin with the Philosophy page and the Systems journey, then explore essays connected to hidden systems and constraints.

actions.label: Ask about release
actions.subject: The Operator’s Guide to Complex Systems

items.title: Systems Thinking for Operators
items.whyItMatters: This book turns systems thinking into an operational discipline for people making decisions under pressure.
items.currentAlternative: Use the Leader or Architect journey and the essays on failure, constraints, and evidence until the full curriculum path is available.

items.title: Trust, Constraints, and Control
items.whyItMatters: This book will explain the relationship between trust, constraint design, authority, and system behavior.
items.currentAlternative: Explore the Trust, Evidence, and Design for Outcomes principles while this node is still planned.

items.title: The Policy Engine Mindset
items.whyItMatters: This book will connect decisions, policy, signals, obligations, and enforcement into a practical operating mindset.
items.currentAlternative: Use the Architecture journey and the Zero Trust Outcome Framework as the active substitute until this book is written.

items.title: Zero Trust Actually Explained
items.whyItMatters: This book will explain Zero Trust as architecture and decision discipline rather than product stack or compliance slogan.
items.currentAlternative: Read the Zero Trust essays and explore the Zero Trust Outcome Framework while the book remains planned.

items.title: Asymmetric Precision
items.whyItMatters: This book will name the AP operating philosophy directly: how to apply precise thinking against complex systems without losing humanity.
items.currentAlternative: Begin with the Oath, Philosophy, and Manifesto-derived principles that already define the school of thought.

items.title: Field Notes from a Systems Architect
items.whyItMatters: This book will collect observations from lived complexity and turn them into reusable signal for leaders, architects, and builders.
items.currentAlternative: Use the Field Notes section as the live observation stream until the book becomes a collected curriculum path.

actions.label: Ask for updates
actions.subject: Field Notes from a Systems Architect
